title: Everglow
description: Vanilla+, Tweaked Terrain and Exploration, Rebalanced and Expanded Progression.
body:
Everglow is a modpack focusing on a Vanilla+ vision of the game, expanding existing systems and adding new content to the game. Focused around the Team Abnormal's mods, Farmer's Delight, Quark and Supplementaries, all of the most essential Vanilla+ content is added.

Transportation is rebalanced, with QOL improvements and buffs to horses and a speed increase for furnace minecarts.

Explore the Overworld, Nether and End; all with many new biomes, creatures and with enhanced terrain and structures.

Due to a focus on balance within the pack to produce the most viable options to the player, some popular mods are excluded from this pack, but may be introduced in future with significant modifications.
